children.name: NHS Trusts (capital & residual funding)
children._note: Reduced from £238.7B by £124.2B to avoid double-counting with top-level NHS Provider Sector. Residual represents capital expenditure (PDC, capital loans), HEE training income, and trusts excluded from the TAC sample.
children._oscar_2023_fix_note: OSCAR 2023 included a £114.07B "Non-patient-facing NHS expenditure" line inside NHS Trusts that does not exist in OSCAR 2024 and represents a data quality artifact (likely cross-node duplication with NHS England commissioning). Removed to align with HM Treasury PSA published DHSC total of £181.7B for 2022/23.
